hooks.command: if [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" != "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f "bun.lockb" ] || [ -f "bun.lock" ]; then npm install -g bun && bun install; elif [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then pnpm install; elif [ -f "yarn.lock" ]; then yarn install; elif [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then npm install; fi
